scripts.build:core: cd packages/wasm && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg
scripts.build:playground: npm run ensure:wasm && npm run build -w @pdf-builder/playground
scripts.dev: npm run ensure:wasm && npm run dev -w @pdf-builder/playground
scripts.build: npm run ensure:wasm && npm run build -w @pdf-builder/sdk && npm run build -w @pdf-builder/playground
